create_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the workflow was created

effective_labels.description: Applied labels after merging user-defined and system-defined labels

id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow instance

revision_id.description: Identifier for the specific revision of the workflow

state.description: Current operational state of the workflow (e.g., ACTIVE, FAILED)

terraform_labels.description: Labels explicitly set in Terraform configuration

update_time.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the workflow
